title: Craftable Reinforced Deepslate
description: adds a crafting recipe for the reinforced deepslate blocks into survival!
body:
# Craftable Reinforced Deepslate

Reinforced Deepslate is one of those blocks with a super interesting texture, but sadly you can't obtain it!
Want to use it in your build anyways? Well, this datapack will work for you!

# Crafting

Craft Reinforced Deepslate using 8 deepslate and a netherite ingot!
"A NETHERITE INGOT?!" I hear you scream. "Yes" I scream back! We're not gonna give it to you for FREE! You're not supposed to have it, that makes it expensive!

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e6a39705405ba943482d60bae7efa0d962224f9.png)
